ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level of the soil or water */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watt per square meter */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "ideal_temperature_range" TEXT /* Ideal temperature range for the crop */,
  "ideal_humidity_range" TEXT /* Ideal humidity range for the crop */,
  "ideal_ph_range" TEXT /* Ideal pH range for the crop */,
  "ideal_rainfall_range" TEXT /* Ideal rainfall range for the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle" TEXT /* Growth cycle of the crop (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "yield_potential" REAL /* Potential yield of the crop in kilograms per hectare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop recommendation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the recommendation is made */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended crop */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "expected_yield" REAL /* Expected yield of the recommended crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_recommendations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_recommendations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, agronomist, data scientist) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop performance record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the crop was grown */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop type */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop in kilograms per hectare */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score of the crop on a scale of 0 to 10 */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of harvest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "pest_management" TEXT /* Pest management practices used */,
  "disease_management" TEXT /* Disease management practices used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_performance_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_performance_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., weather station, sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data source is situated */,
  "measurement_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the data source measures environmental data (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected by the data source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the report was generated */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., yield, health, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to train the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to assess model performance (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was captured */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the image was taken */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the satellite image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_imagery_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
